moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships continue this week, culminating in the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Who's making it to Centre Court for the Wimbledon finals? The tension is building as we head towards championship weekend!

angles.name: Key Matches
angles.copy: It's quarter-final day at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to serve up a win and reach the semis?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Can any British hopefuls go all the way at Wimbledon this year? The home crowd is roaring them on!

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, with riders currently tackling challenging stages through France after starting in Barcelona.

angles.name: Race Progress
angles.copy: The peloton is deep into the Tour de France. Who's wearing the yellow jersey as we head into the mountains?

angles.name: Stage Focus
angles.copy: Another gruelling stage in the Tour de France today! Will we see a breakaway or a sprint finish?

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, is set to begin next week at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with practice days starting July 12.

angles.name: Excitement Building
angles.copy: Get ready for links golf! The Open Championship is just days away from Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Home Course Advantage
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts The Open again! Which golfer will master the challenging Southport course?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancelled
moments.blurb: The Wireless Festival, scheduled for July 10-12 at Finsbury Park, London, has been cancelled due to the UK government rejecting headliner Ye's entry into the country.

angles.name: Breaking News
angles.copy: Big news for festival-goers: Wireless Festival 2026 has been cancelled! Were you planning to go?

angles.name: Impact on Fans
angles.copy: Wireless Festival called off days before it was due to start. Our thoughts are with everyone who had tickets!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off tomorrow in Moseley Park, Birmingham, running until Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Birmingham, get ready! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starts tomorrow. Who's joining for a weekend of incredible music?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Heading to Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul? Catch amazing acts all weekend in Moseley Park!

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK continues nightly, bringing fresh drama and romance from the Mallorca villa to ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What's going down in the villa tonight?

angles.name: Hot Topic
angles.copy: The latest Love Island recoupling has everyone talking! Who's your favourite couple this week?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Peaks
moments.blurb: Large parts of the UK, particularly central, southern, and eastern England, are experiencing a heatwave, with temperatures peaking around 35-36°C today and tomorrow.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: It's scorching out there! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool as the UK heatwave reaches its peak today and tomorrow.

angles.name: London Heat
angles.copy: London is set for highs of 33°C today! How are you beating the heat in the capital?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are set to begin for many across England and Wales from late next week, with some schools in Northern Ireland already on break.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are almost here for many! What are your plans for the big break?

angles.name: Welsh Schools Out
angles.copy: Summer holidays are just around the corner for schools across Wales! Who's excited for a break?

moments.title: New Official Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The brand new Official UK Singles Chart Top 40 is announced tomorrow. Who will be number one this week?

angles.name: Chart Prediction
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a new UK Number 1! Who do you think will top the Official Singles Chart?

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: It's almost New Music Friday and a brand new chart! What songs are you hoping to see climb the ranks?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and TV personality Jessica Simpson turns 46 tomorrow. (Born July 10, 1980)

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a very happy 46th birthday to pop icon Jessica Simpson! What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Arlo Guthrie
moments.blurb: American folk singer-songwriter Arlo Guthrie, son of Woody Guthrie, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow. (Born July 10, 1947)

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow we're wishing a very happy 79th birthday to folk legend Arlo Guthrie!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on Saturday. (Born July 11, 1959)

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: On Saturday, a happy 67th birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega! What's your favourite of her iconic tracks?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday. (Born July 11, 1959)

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to rock legend and former Bon Jovi guitarist, Richie Sambora, this Saturday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: American musician Roger McGuinn, best known as the frontman of The Byrds, turns 84 on Monday. (Born July 13, 1942)

angles.name: Folk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: On Monday, a huge happy 84th birthday to folk-rock pioneer Roger McGuinn of The Byrds!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Chris Cross
moments.blurb: Chris Cross, the bassist and founding member of the iconic new wave band Ultravox, turns 74 on Tuesday. (Born July 14, 1952)

angles.name: New Wave Icon
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to Chris Cross, the legendary bassist from Ultravox, this Tuesday! What's your favourite Ultravox hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Dan Reynolds
moments.blurb: Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds celebrates his 39th birthday on Tuesday. (Born July 14, 1987)

angles.name: Modern Rock Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 39th birthday to the incredible Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons this Tuesday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice, turns 80 on Wednesday. (Born July 15, 1946)

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: A huge happy 80th birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt this Wednesday! What's your favourite of her timeless hits?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: The brilliant drummer and co-founder of The Police, Stewart Copeland, turns 74 next Thursday. (Born July 16, 1952)

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the 74th birthday of The Police's drumming powerhouse, Stewart Copeland!

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) celebrates her 51st birthday next Saturday. (Born July 18, 1975)

angles.name: Boundary Breaker
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 51st birthday to the groundbreaking artist M.I.A. next Saturday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, CBE, turns 79 next Sunday. (Born July 19, 1947)

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Next Sunday, a massive happy 79th birthday to the one and only Dr. Brian May from Queen!
